lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Where did David and his family hide from Saul?
Why did Saul go into the cave?
What did David’s men want him to do to Saul?
What did David do instead of killing Saul?
answers: Cut off a piece of Saul’s robe

questions.text: Why did David refuse to kill Saul?
answers: Because Saul was God’s anointed king
Because he didn't have a sharp sword

questions.text: David showed the torn piece of robe to Saul. What did that prove?
answers: David could have killed Saul but chose not to
David thought Saul's robe was ugly
David had a robe that looked just like Saul's

questions.text: Why could David and Abishai sneak into Saul’s camp without being seen?
answers: God caused a deep sleep to fall on everyone

questions.text: What did Abishai ask David for permission to do?
What did David do instead of killing Saul in the camp?
answers: Took his spear and water jug
Wrote a scary message and left it on Saul's chest

questions.text: What did Saul do when he saw David with his spear and water jug?
answers: He admitted he had sinned and stopped chasing David
He asked David to fix his robe
He gave his crown to David
